strengths: 10+ years of full-stack development with deep expertise in TypeScript/Node.js and React
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) at re:cinq
Strong background in optimization, scalability, and performance for high-traffic systems (e.g., millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
concerns: Primary stack alignment is strong, but secondary stack includes Dlang/Ember.js which are not part of the target tech stack
Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kubernetes in recent roles (though AWS CDK and MongoDB are used)
Recent role (re:cinq) is very short (April 2025–Present), raising questions about tenure stability
response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and React, including recent AI-agent work, which aligns strongly with the role. However, his tenures at some roles are short (e.g., re:cinq), and his secondary stack includes non-target technologies like Dlang and Ember.js. His depth in optimization and scalability is a major plus.
